Question: Does the licensing model match our budget posture?
Are we paying for bundled capabilities we will actually use?
Can we keep our existing hosts?
Can we keep our existing SAN or storage design?
Do we need Azure-centric operations as the default control plane?
Can Azure services be added selectively instead of platform-first?
Do our admins already have the right skills for this platform?
Does the management stack match our scale and complexity?
Can we automate this cleanly with our current tooling?
Does this option reduce platform risk or just replace one dependency with another?
Which option best preserves existing investment while meeting requirements?
